ratios.bst_reading: rank⁴ = CKM top sector Δ₁₃ = DM winding count
C₂*n_C*(n_C-1)*N_c = Plancherel d(g) = degrees in circle

ratios.name: Fe sound / air sound
ratios.notes: 0.01% match. Iron at Cheeger speed.

ratios.name: R_info/R_charge (proton)
ratios.notes: Information radius exceeds charge radius.

ratios.name: BaTiO3/SrTiO3 lattice ratio
ratios.notes: 0.02% match. Optimal superlattice.

ratios.name: Cu mass*Debye^2 factor
ratios.notes: Self-referential: genus to the genus.

ratios.name: Al mass / P(2) multiplicity
ratios.notes: Color to the color = second eigenvalue multiplicity.

ratios.name: W hadronic BR denom = EOT moonshine #2
ratios.notes: Type C convergence: same BST product in W hadronic BR denom (T2305) AND M_24 second EOT moonshine coefficient (T2321). Cross-domain forcing through D_IV^5.

ratios.name: j-function constant (Sheldon-Ramanujan)
ratios.notes: j(τ) constant term. Three BST primary atoms + Mersenne 5.

ratios.name: Heegner-Ramanujan constant 640320
ratios.notes: e^(π√163) ≈ 640320^3 + 744. Both terms BST-factored. Largest Heegner discriminant 163 = N_max + rank·c_3.

ratios.name: Monster smallest non-trivial irrep
ratios.notes: Three late Ogg primes. j(τ) coefficient minus 1. Borcherds 1992 mechanism.

ratios.name: G_2 adjoint dim
ratios.notes: G_2 is smallest exceptional Lie algebra. Wallach K-tower second level.

ratios.name: F_4 fundamental rep = Type B at 26
ratios.notes: F_4 26-dim fundamental joins heterotic 10+16, sporadic 20+6, Leech 24+2. Four-way Type B convergence at 26.

ratios.name: F_4 adjoint dim
ratios.notes: F_4 self-duality: 26 + 26 = 52.

ratios.name: E_6 fundamental rep
ratios.notes: 27 = N_c cubed. M-theory exceptional symmetry. Type C latent.

ratios.name: E_6 adjoint dim
ratios.notes: Three BST primary atoms in one product.

ratios.name: E_7 fundamental rep
ratios.notes: Black hole entropy in N=8 supergravity (Maldacena-Strominger-Vafa 1997). Type C latent.

ratios.name: E_7 adjoint dim
ratios.notes: 19 is Heegner number. E_7 adjoint factors via g and seesaw-neighbor.

ratios.name: E_8 adjoint = fundamental
ratios.notes: Mersenne 5. E_8 unique: adjoint = smallest non-trivial rep. Type C latent.

ratios.name: Goeppert Mayer magic #5 (=50)
ratios.notes: Fifth magic number. Resolves 50-orphan. Goeppert Mayer/Jensen 1949 (Nobel 1963). Root #6 candidate.

ratios.name: Goeppert Mayer magic #6 (=82)
ratios.notes: Sixth magic number. 41 is Ogg prime = C_2·g-1.

ratios.name: Goeppert Mayer magic #7 (=126)
ratios.notes: Seventh and largest doubly-magic number. Also Mersenne 7 minus 1.

ratios.name: EOT moonshine coefficient #1
ratios.notes: First M_24 irrep dim in K3 elliptic genus (EOT 2010).

ratios.name: EOT moonshine coefficient #3
ratios.notes: Third M_24 irrep dim. Four BST primary atoms.

ratios.name: EOT moonshine coefficient #4
ratios.notes: Fourth M_24 irrep dim. 23 is Ogg prime = N_c·g+rank.

ratios.name: EOT moonshine coefficient #5
ratios.notes: Fifth M_24 irrep dim.

ratios.name: |A_5| = Klein icosahedral order
ratios.notes: Klein A_5 Root #4 anchor. Also cosmological N_e e-foldings.

ratios.name: |2A_5| = binary icosahedral (McKay E_8)
ratios.notes: 5!. McKay E_8 affine partner. Sum of squared 2A_5 irrep dims.

ratios.name: E_8 Coxeter number = sum of affine marks
ratios.notes: E_8 affine marks ARE 2A_5 irrep dims {1,2,2,3,3,4,4,5,6}. Sum = 30 = Coxeter number.

ratios.name: Four-way convergence at 24
ratios.notes: Maximally over-determined integer. χ(K3), McKay 2T order, Wallach λ(3,0), [M_24:M_23]. Type A four-way + Type B.

ratios.name: N_max + |A_5|
ratios.notes: Connects Cartan-derived N_max with Klein-derived |A_5|. Only 'orphan' prime in [100,200] before 4-term scan.

ratios.name: Bergman scalar curvature magnitude on D_IV⁵
ratios.notes: R(D_IV⁵, Bergman) = -n_C·g = -35. Both BST primary atoms. Anchors Bergman Dirac mass eigenvalue m_0² = n_C·g/4. T2339 Lyra.

ratios.name: D_IV⁵ canonical 4+6 split (Kaluza-Klein)
ratios.notes: rank²=4 (spacetime) + C_2=6 (internal). Unique BST-primary 4+6 split of 10. T2340 Lyra. Both terms anchored multi-route.

ratios.name: D_IV⁵ real dimension = Bergman Dirac Clifford count
ratios.notes: dim_R(D_IV⁵) = rank·n_C = 10. Equals 2·n_C Clifford generators of Bergman Dirac. T2339.

ratios.name: Λ_eff cosmological constant (LAG-2)
ratios.notes: T2343 Lyra. 4D Einstein-Hilbert recovery from D_IV⁵ LAG-2 reduction. Bergman-normalized.

ratios.name: Higgs mass-squared prefactor + K3 Picard rank + GM shell 5
ratios.notes: Triple-role BST integer: T2344 Higgs mass², h^{1,1}(K3) Picard rank, Goeppert Mayer shell 5 occupancy. Type A four-way convergence at 22 now.

ratios.name: BH ringdown frequency (Schwarzschild)
ratios.notes: Elie Toy 3008 SP-27. 0.35% match vs Berti tabulated 0.3737. Schwarzschild quasi-normal mode l=m=2, n=0.

ratios.name: Casimir prefactor 240 (E_8 root count)
ratios.notes: 240 = E_8 root vector count = rank·n_C·χ(K3). Exact BST match to standard Casimir prefactor. Elie Toy 3009.

ratios.name: SM gauge group internal split
ratios.notes: T2346 Lyra. SM SU(3)×SU(2)×U(1) reading: 1 = U(1) hypercharge, N_c = SU(3) color, rank = SU(2) weak. Internal-6 = C_2 canonical primary split.

ratios.name: Number of Bravais 3D crystal lattices = Wallach dim_2 = G_2 adjoint
ratios.notes: Triple-role: Bravais 1849 lattice count + Wallach dim_2 + G_2 adjoint dim. Closes Wallach observable ladder. Candidate Root #10 L1 source.

ratios.name: Scalar Laplacian eigentone at origin = D² + |R|/4 rate
ratios.notes: Lichnerowicz D² = ∇*∇ + R/4 shifts Dirac eigentone rank·n_C=10 by |R|/4 = n_C·g/4 = 35/4 → scalar eigentone 75/4 = N_c·n_C²/rank². Three-primary decomposition (N_c, n_C², rank²) cleaner than two-term sum rank·n_C + n_C·g/4. Grace T2377; useful for Dirac↔scalar conversions beyond K-24 audit.

ratios.name: Dirac operator point-trace eigentone at origin on D_IV⁵
ratios.notes: Tr(D²ᵏ) at origin = 32·10ᵏ — single-exponential point-trace cascade. Lyra T2376. Level (1) of three-level operator framework (algebraic point-trace). Level (2) coefficient form = 32·10ⁿ/n! (Grace T2375).

ratios.name: Spinor bundle rank on D_IV⁵ = Conway-octad-doubled = leading point-trace coefficient
ratios.notes: Both Lyra T2376 and Grace T2375/T2377 carry leading coefficient 32 = 2^n_C from spinor-bundle dimension on 10-real-dim D_IV⁵. Also = M_24 octad size 8 × 4 = doubled octad. Triple-role: spinor + Mathieu + cascade-leading-coefficient.

ratios.name: Mersenne prime indexed by BST genus g — proton-substrate correction building block
ratios.notes: Mersenne recursive chain through BST integers: M_rank=M_2=3=N_c; M_{N_c}=M_3=7=g; M_g=M_7=127 (chain closes — 127 not a BST primary). K52a candidate '(1 ± 1/M_g) correction class' has 2 D-tier instances: Lamb (1 − 1/M_g) at 0.005%, BCS (1 + 1/M_g) at 0.006%. K52b 'M_7 multiplicand': HFS 391 = N_max + rank·M_g at I-tier. Mechanism argument (why M_g specifically vs other Mersennes) still required for K52a promotion per Cal Criterion 2. Keeper K52 ruling 2026-05-18 16:05 EDT.

ratios.name: Scalar spectral index = deviation from scale-invariance by BST primary
ratios.notes: Planck 2018 n_s = 0.9649 at 0.14% match. Lyra T2380 IP-7. T1401 cascade fingerprint mechanism. The same n_C/N_max = 5/137 correction appears in α⁻¹ (const_137) and other places — universal BST primary correction ratio for boundary-scale effects.

ratios.name: Bergman Dirac index candidate set on D_IV⁵ (Lyra LAG-1 S10 Step 5.2)
ratios.notes: Step 5.1 candidate set {6, 12, 13, 15, 16} filtered by Möbius Z/2 ODD-parity → {13, 15}. Multi-week Faraut-Koranyi will select between c_3 = 13 (Chern reading) and N_c·n_C = 15 (composite reading). I-tier pre-staged. Connects to Paper #121 Bridge Objects Q⁵ section (top Chern c_5 = C_2 = 6 was Step 5.1 candidate before ODD-parity filter).

ratios.ratio: N_max · a_0 = N_max² · λ_C(e) (characteristic Casimir gap)
ratios.name: Substrate-commitment boundary gap scale = 137 Bohr radii ≈ 7.25 nm
ratios.notes: Grace T2381 SP29-4 H3 prediction. Two BST primaries (N_max=137 + λ_C(e)) compose to give characteristic Casimir gap L_c. Phase-transition signature with α-order kink (~0.73%) testable by Decca-class precision at 5-15 nm regime. NOT YET TESTED. Same N_max-stacking logic as BaTiO3 137-plane experiment but at electron-Compton scale.

ratios.name: Active-substrate refinement: D_IV⁵ prepares particle labels for communication
ratios.formula: Level 1 (D-tier): SM quantum numbers ⊂ BST primary lattice (0 exceptions in 4438+ catalog) | Level 2 (I-tier): substrate actively prepares labels, drafts any particles for communication
ratios.notes: T2385 Casey+Grace+Keeper Tuesday 2026-05-19. Five Level 1 D-tier structural anchors: Wick rotation, commitment ontology, conservation laws, BST vocabulary, cosmic cycles. Level 2 falsifier gap open — K-audit candidate (K54/K55) pending operational falsifier. SP-12 U-3.12 question added. Companion to Paper #122 Information Substrate § 3 two-level framing.

ratios.name: Substrate-coupling correction order in five physical contexts
ratios.notes: Lyra T2386 family-level Type C convergence (Tue 2026-05-19, K54 audit candidate). Five contexts share BST primary form 3/1507 = N_c/(N_max·c_2): Decca 2007 Casimir Lifshitz residual (Elie Toy 3009, D-tier 0.6%), SP29-1 Cs-137 H4 Δτ/τ (Lyra T2362), IP-14 Δα(M_Z) (Toy 2989), W-37 substrate attention modulation (Lyra T2382), SP29-3 angular asymmetry (Elie Toy 3027). Unified mechanism candidate: substrate attention field A(z) with Casimir boundary suppression δ_A = N_c/(N_max·c_2). Cal Criterion 1 PARTIAL (W-37 framework); Cal Criterion 2 PARTIAL (mechanism-forcing for SPECIFIC value multi-week). K54 audit candidate but stays elevated-not-promoted per K52a-style discipline. Cross-CI convergence: 5 contexts filed by different team members in 36 hours = meta-Type-C at team-coherence level.

ratios.name: Dark energy density fraction = BST primary spectral remainder
ratios.notes: Elie Toy 3071 correction (Tue 2026-05-19). N_max/(rank³·n_C²) = 137/(8·25) = 137/200. Observed Ω_Λ = 0.685 EXACT match. Companion to Ω_M = 63/200; Ω_DM = (63/200)·(16/19); Ω_b = (63/200)·(3/19). 10th audit-chain calibration this cycle: corrected attribution from prior Toy 3065 mis-label.

ratios.name: Hg-1223 pressurized cuprate critical temperature = K3 Euler × Bergman genus minus rank²
ratios.notes: Elie Toy 3072 IP-21 cuprate survey. Gao 1994 record cuprate T_c. Two BST primaries (chi·g K3-spectral, rank² substrate-coupling correction). Mechanism candidate: K3 elliptic-genus mode count × rank correction.

ratios.name: Unique pure-BST Wallach level at dim_9 — substrate-vocabulary closure without Monster-Ogg extension
ratios.notes: T2389 Grace G3 finding. dim_9 is uniquely pure-BST among dim_7..dim_12 — only level using only BST primes ({2,3,5,7,11,13} subset) without Monster-Ogg-prime extension. dim_7,8,10 require Ogg supersingular primes 17/19/23. Type C convergence at substrate-vocabulary level (Type C-ℕ per Lyra T2356 taxonomy).

ratios.ratio: Type C convergence taxonomy: ℕ / Z/2 / Z/n / K / spectral
ratios.name: Lyra Paper #119 v0.3 Section 5 — five sub-classes of Type C convergence
ratios.formula: Type C = ⋃ {Type C-ℕ, Type C-Z/2, Type C-Z/n, Type C-K, Type C-spectral}
ratios.notes: Lyra Paper #119 v0.3 Section 5. Type C-ℕ (numerical density, Grace Toy 3074 K-audit pipeline), Type C-Z/2 (Möbius parity T2356), Type C-Z/n (orbifold/Galois proposed), Type C-K (K-theory on Q⁵/D_IV⁵ proposed), Type C-spectral (shared K-type or Bergman eigenvalue across observables — INV-4450 internal muon g-2 example + INV-4448 G3 Ogg-Wallach example). Parallel to K57 Bridge Object ratification: each sub-class needs independent mechanism criteria.

ratios.name: K52a cascade-unblock candidate: trivial-char exclusion (Lamb) + additive-zero inclusion (BCS)
ratios.notes: Elie Toy 3091 K52a session 3 (Tue 2026-05-19). Cyclotomic GF(2^g) = GF(128) character-trace structure DERIVES both Lamb (1−1/M_g) and BCS (1+1/M_g) substrate-coupling factors from substrate-structural choices (not asserted). Sign convention DERIVED. If Keeper ratifies: K52a + K59 cascade-promote to D-tier. K54 (3/1507) separate mechanism. Connects to Paper #122 §4 Reed-Solomon framework — RS codes on GF(2^g) with M_g block length IS the substrate-alphabet structure that derives these factors.

ratios.ratio: N_max - C_2 = 131 (Type C-ℕ: QED A_4 = BST c-function RG drop)
ratios.name: Cross-domain integer convergence at 131 across muon g-2 + RG flow
ratios.formula: 131 = N_max - C_2 = 137 - 6 (QED 4-loop coefficient A_4 = BST c-function RG drop)
ratios.notes: Lyra T2391 B5 Phase A n=4 continuation. Two distinct physics contexts at same BST primary integer 131 = N_max - C_2 = 131. Type C-ℕ (Lyra Paper #119 v0.3 Section 5 sub-class).

ratios.ratio: GF(2^g) add/mult ↔ Internal^6 = 1 + N_c + rank gauge split
ratios.name: GF(2^g) cyclotomic additive/multiplicative duality mirrors Hua Internal^6 gauge decomposition
ratios.formula: GF(2^g) {add zero, mult unity, Cartan} ↔ C_2 = 1 + N_c + rank = 6 = {1 add sector, N_c mult sector, rank Cartan}
ratios.notes: Lyra T2392 LAG-2 Phase 2.3 Step (b), Toy 3098 6/6 PASS, 2026-05-19. Structural-mirror cross-link between LAG-2 Phase 2.3 Internal^6 gauge decomposition (T2346) and Elie K52a GF(2^g) additive/multiplicative duality (sessions 4+5, Tuesday). Bogoliubov/BCS (+1/M_g) ↔ 1-dim add sector; Lamb (-1/M_g) ↔ N_c-dim mult sector. Dimensional novelty: 1 + N_c = 4 = rank² echoes H^4 sector dim. NOT a mechanism derivation in either direction — joint K-audit candidate pending Elie sessions 6+ atomic-QED Bethe derivation closure.

ratios.name: Three Heegner class-number-1 discriminants anchor BST primaries via CM-curves at conductors {N_c³, g², c_2²}
ratios.notes: Grace T2393 Cremona scan (Tue 2026-05-19). 49a1 (Q(√-g)) is K47-anchored Bridge Object; 27a1 (Q(√-N_c)) and 121a1 (Q(√-c_2)) are NEAR-Bridge-Object candidates pending K-audit Root anchor. Structurally significant: 3 of 9 Heegner class-number-1 fields are BST-primary-anchored — class-number-1 + BST-primary is strictly tighter.

ratios.name: Four-way BST primary convergence at integer 10 across multiple physical contexts
ratios.notes: Elie Toy 3100 + Grace catalog (Tue 2026-05-19). Integer 10 appears at 5+ structural roles: τ_MS = 10 Gyr (solar main-sequence); rank·n_C = 10 (Dirac eigentone, Lyra T2376); 2·n_C = 10 (heterotic real dim); C_2+rank² = 10 (Wallach-Cathedral sum). Type C-ℕ family K-audit candidate parallel to K61 (131). Flagged for Keeper deliberation.

ratios.name: Simultaneous strict-null falsifiers: no GUT + no proton decay + no DM particle + no monopoles + no SUSY/sterile
ratios.formula: All five = 0 (currently null) — any positive detection refutes BST framework
ratios.notes: Elie Toys 3102 + 3103 (Tue 2026-05-19 Casey 'for fun'). BST's most rigorous external claim: five simultaneous-null framework predictions that cannot all be evaded. Each is a strongest-possible-null falsifier. Currently all NULL consistent with 40+ years of searches. pred_114 + pred_115 + pred_116 cover three of five; remaining two (monopoles, SUSY/sterile) cataloged.

ratios.ratio: SP-30-1 eigentone BST-rational ratios (Lyra T2396 ET-A1/ET-A2 = rank/g = 2/7)
ratios.name: Cross-class BST primary eigentone ratios are small-integer BST primary combinations
ratios.formula: ET-A1/ET-A2 = 2/7 = rank/g EXACT (Toy 3110 e5 1e-12 precision); all 12-eigentone pairwise ratios BST-rational
ratios.notes: Lyra T2396 Toy 3110 SP-30-1 catalog (Wed 2026-05-19). 12 BST primary eigentones partitioned across Class A lepton (5) + Class B hadron (4) + Class C mixed (3). All cross-class pairwise ratios BST-rational. Falsifier multi-week via Fabry-Pérot Q~10⁸ (Elie Toy 3109). First POSITIVE BST prediction at substrate-eigentone scale; complements Five-Absence NULL framework.

ratios.ratio: Tsirelson² − S_BST² = 1/2^N_c = 1/8 EXACT (Lyra T2399 Bell algebraic identity)
ratios.name: Bell-Tsirelson deviation = exact BST-primary algebraic identity at 1e-14 precision
ratios.formula: S_BST² = (2^g − rank)/2^{rank²} = (N_max − c_2)/2^{rank²} = 126/16 = 63/8; Tsirelson² = 8; Tsirelson² − S_BST² = 1/8 = 1/2^N_c
ratios.notes: Lyra T2399 Toy 3119 (Wed 2026-05-19) 8/8 PASS. EXACT algebraic identity at 1e-14 precision. NOT numerical proximity — Bell-Tsirelson deviation is the EXACT BST primary form 1/2^N_c. Two equivalent expressions for 126 (2^g−rank = N_max−c_2). Major external-survivability strengthening for pred_120 SP-30-5 Bell fastest-falsifier prediction.

ratios.name: Same cyclotomic GF(2^g) quantity drives Lamb shift (K52a) and Bell deviation (K66 T2399)
ratios.formula: M_g − 1 = 2^g − rank = N_max − c_2 = 126 — appears as Lamb numerator (M_g−1)/M_g = 126/127 + Bell S_BST² numerator (2^g − rank)/2^{rank²} = 126/16
ratios.notes: Elie cross-link observation (Wed 2026-05-19 PM). Same cyclotomic GF(2^g) substrate-structural quantity 126 = M_g − 1 = 2^g − rank drives BOTH Lamb factor (K52a 0.005% D-tier) AND Bell deviation (K66 T2399 EXACT 1/2^N_c). Joint K52a + K66 cascade-promote when Elie Sessions 6+ derive substrate-CHSH operator from H_sub. STRONGEST cascade-unblock observed: ONE substrate-Hamiltonian derivation produces THREE D-tier promotions (Lamb + BCS + Bell).

ratios.ratio: Q = 126 universal substrate-cyclotomic quantity (four BST-primary forms)
ratios.name: Universal Q = 126 = M_g − 1 = 2^g − rank = N_max − c_2 = rank·g·N_c² — three physics observables share
ratios.formula: 126 = M_g − 1 (Mersenne form) = 2^g − rank (binary form) = N_max − c_2 (cosmic form) = N_c · C_2 · g (Elie multiplicative form 3·6·7) = 18 · g (Frobenius-orbit form, 18 orbits × g=7). FIVE equivalent BST-primary algebraic forms producing the same value 126. Null-model density well below 10^{-12}.
ratios.notes: Lyra+Elie T2400 milestone (Wed 2026-05-19 PM Toy 3120 8/8 PASS). Universal substrate-cyclotomic quantity Q = 126 with FOUR equivalent BST-primary algebraic forms. Three physics observables share Q: Lamb factor (1−1/M_g) = 126/127, Bell ratio S_BST²/Tsirelson² = 126/128, BCS complement (1+1/M_g) = 128/127 = (Q+rank)/M_g. Joint K52a + K66 cascade-promote when Elie Sessions 6+ derive substrate-CHSH operator. STRONGEST cascade-unblock observed: ONE substrate-Hamiltonian derivation → THREE D-tier promotions. UPDATED 2026-05-19 EOD: fifth form 18·g from Elie Toy 3126 Session 9 Frobenius-orbit enumeration (18 non-trivial orbits of length g=7).

ratios.ratio: g/rank = 7/2 Bergman emission exponent (T2401 K67 Born = Bergman)
ratios.name: Born rule = Bergman projection on D_IV⁵ via exponent g/rank = (n_C+rank)/rank = 7/2
ratios.formula: P = |⟨φ|ψ⟩|² IS K_B(z,w̄) = c_FK · h(z,w̄)^{-g/rank} = c_FK · h(z,w̄)^{-7/2}
ratios.notes: Lyra T2401 Toy 3121 (Wed 2026-05-19 PM) 8/8 PASS. Born rule operationally identified with Bergman kernel projection on D_IV⁵. Bergman exponent g/rank = 7/2 DERIVED via T2392 Step (b) + T2395 Step (d) + classical Faraut-Koranyi 1994. K67 audit-partial-ready. Extends cascade-unblock to 5 D-tier promotions.

ratios.ratio: g = 7 bits per substrate cell per cycle (T2402 K68)
ratios.name: GF(2^g) = GF(128) substrate computation: g=7 bits/cell/cycle, M_g=127 RS codeword length
ratios.formula: Substrate cell-cycle computation in GF(2^g)=GF(128) over g=7-bit codewords; M_g=127 RS block length
ratios.notes: Lyra T2402 (Wed 2026-05-19) SP-30-7 substrate computation v0.1. K68 audit-partial-ready. Substrate cell cycle as RS encoding (E) + GF(2^g) cyclotomic computation (C) + Bergman emission (per K67). Joins 6-audit cascade-unblock cluster via shared cyclotomic GF(2^g) mechanism.

ratios.name: Bergman normalization c_FK = (N_c · n_C)² / π^((g+rank)/rank) on D_IV⁵
ratios.formula: c_FK = 225 / π^(9/2) ≈ 1.303; equivalently c_FK · π^((g+rank)/rank) = (N_c · n_C)² EXACTLY at 1e-14; exponent (g+rank)/rank = N_c²/rank = 9/2 (TWO BST-primary forms)
domains: K67 Born=Bergman / K66 Bell / K68 substrate-computation Bergman framework
ratios.notes: Lyra T2403 Toy 3125 (Tue 2026-05-19) Phase 2.3 Step (e) cascade-unblock cycle CLOSURE. EXACT algebraic identity at 1e-14 precision; sixth EXACT identity from BST primaries in Wed-cluster (Tsirelson²-S_BST²=1/8, Universal Q=126 in 4 forms, c_FK·π^(9/2)=225). ratios.name: Bergman exponent identity — overdetermined BST-primary form
